guion_padre.introduccion: Welcome to Lesson 51. Today we will explore some wonderful sounds.
guion_padre.instruccion_gr: Point to the big GR and say: grgrgr. Keep the sound going!
guion_padre.instruccion_pl: Now point to the big PL and say: plplpl.

parent_story: Green grass grew near the plate. A plane flew high over the grass.
